use_cases: Display customer testimonials with avatar images on landing pages
Showcase social proof with user reviews on product pages
Build trust sections for SaaS pricing or feature pages
Create testimonial grids for portfolio or agency websites
ai_summary: A testimonial card component featuring Radix UI Avatar primitives for displaying user profile images with fallbacks. The component renders testimonial content with user avatars in a flat, minimalist style suitable for social proof sections on landing pages, product showcases, and marketing websites across various industries.
